name: Daily Briefing
description: Research scans feeds -> Main summarizes and delivers briefing

steps.action: Scan RSS feeds and blog monitors for notable news from the last 24 hours. Write a summary to shared/inbox/main/ with subject 'Daily Research Summary'.
Scan AI news feeds for notable updates from the last 24 hours. Write a summary to shared/inbox/main/ with subject 'Daily AI Research Summary'.
Read research summaries from inbox. Combine them into a concise daily briefing and send it to Anthony via Telegram.
